location: Sitting in front of the altar inside the Church of the Eclipse, a small chapel on the upper level of Castle Sol, in the northern Mountaintops of the Giants.

source.name: altar item, Church of the Eclipse (Castle Sol)

tactics: Reach Castle Sol in the northern Mountaintops of the Giants; a Tibia Mariner boat-enemy patrols the valley leading in, so be ready for it
From the Castle Sol Main Gate grace, work up through the castle interior to the church, a side room off the main hall
No fight is needed for the sword itself, but continuing through the castle leads to the boss Commander Niall
Don't confuse this with the plain 'Shotel' — a cheaper, differently-scaling weapon sold by a merchant in Siofra River — the two look similar but play very differently
lore: A treasured blade of Castle Sol, engraved with the image of a sun in eclipse and drained of all color. Those who lay eyes on it are said to feel an inexplicable dread.

builds.name: Faith/Dexterity death-flare build
builds.why: Splits D-tier scaling between Dexterity and Faith and carries the Death Flare skill, buffing Holy damage while stacking Death blight for a burst execute.
